headline: Realty Income Announces Chief Legal Officer Transition
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that its Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, General Counsel and Secretary, Michelle Bushore, is leaving the Company. To ensure a smooth transition, Ms. Bushore will continue to serve in her role through September 2, 2026, while the Company conducts a search for a new Chief Legal Officer.

raw.headline: Realty Income Announces Chief Legal Officer Transition

headline: Realty Income Announces Participation in Upcoming Citi 2026 Global Property CEO Conference
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that Sumit Roy, Realty Income's President and Chief Executive Officer, will present at Citi's 31st Annual Global Property CEO Conference on Tuesday, March 3rd, 2026 at 11:40 a.m. EST/8:40 a.m. PST.

headline: REIT ETFs in the Spotlight as U.S. Mortgage Rate Sinks Below 6%
summary: REIT ETFs, like SCHH, are in focus after the 30-year mortgage rate dipped to 5.98%, boosting real estate valuations and dividend appeal.
